channel.title: Um Actually
channel.description: Latest releases from Um Actually on Dropout.tv

item.title: Terminally Online
item.description:
SungWon, Drew, and Jarvis talk about Pokémon shiny rates and the Tommy Westphall universe.

Duration: 32:25

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, trivia, pop culture, superfans, nerds, internet, game shows, unscripted, jumping the shark, how it happened, this vs that, one of these things is not like the other, sungwon cho, drew gooden, jarvis johnson, jiavani
